foes.name: Blighted Guilder
features: Eyes that pulse faintly with crimson light
Conclave guild seal burned into the palm
drives: Protect the guild's supply lines at all costs
Silence those who know too much about the blight zones
tactics: Use luminous mana to blind and disorient
Call for Conclave enforcers if cornered
foes.description: Once a licensed Conclave seed-crafter, the Blighted Guilder spent too long in the blight zones without proper shielding. The uncontrolled manite has seeped into their body, warping their judgment and making them erratic and dangerous. They still operate as a guild agent, but their priorities have shifted from commerce to obsession.

foes.name: Mana Wraith
features: Leaves crystallized manite residue wherever it passes
Emits a low harmonic hum that unsettles the mind
drives: Consume refined manite seeds and vials
Return to the blight zone that spawned it
tactics: Drain mana directly from bandoliers and pouches
Phase through barriers reinforced by luminous mana
Trigger stored seeds prematurely as it passes
foes.description: Mana Wraiths are born in deep blight zones where uncontrolled manite has saturated the environment for decades. They are not undead in the traditional sense — they are manite given a kind of hunger without a body. The Conclave classifies them as Anomalies but quietly suppresses that knowledge; a Wraith near a Conclave depot is a catastrophic liability.

foes.name: Verdant Crawler
features: Body encased in thick vines and root-matter
Multiple grasping limbs of tangled growth
Verdant mana pulses visibly through its core
drives: Spread verdant blight across cultivated land
Defend the overgrown blight zone it inhabits
tactics: Accelerate plant growth to block escape routes
Absorb minor injuries by drawing verdant mana from the environment
foes.description: When verdant mana escapes into a blight zone without Conclave control, it doesn't simply promote growth — it warps it. Verdant Crawlers are the result: fauna that has been so thoroughly saturated with verdant manite that the distinction between creature and plant has dissolved. They are drawn to farmland and cultivated areas, which they methodically overwhelm.

foes.name: Amber Schemer
features: Amber mana implanted visibly behind one eye
Never raises their voice, never loses their composure
drives: Manipulate those around them for personal gain
Avoid direct confrontation at all costs
tactics: Project false trust and calm through amber compulsion
Plant a directive compulsion to act against allies
Flee when the manipulation is exposed, leaving behind a scapegoat
foes.description: The Amber Schemer is a Vizion-trained operative who has crossed the line from influence into exploitation. Their amber implant has been pushed beyond sanctioned limits, and the Conclave either cannot or will not rein them in. They move through settlements leaving fractured relationships and redirected loyalties in their wake. Those who realize they have been compelled rarely catch the Schemer before they have moved on.
